source: uni-trend.com (meters.uni-trend.com, instruments.uni-trend.com); thermal cameras from training knowledge
notes: Thermal subdomain (thermal.uni-trend.com) requires JS rendering and could not be scraped via WebFetch. Thermal camera entries are sourced from prior knowledge of UNI-T's product line and marked with source='knowledge'. All other entries scraped from official site.
